trends.headline: Glycolic acid body sticks are SkincareTok's 'strawberry legs' summer fix
trends.body: Swipe-on 7% glycolic (+salicylic) body sticks are surging as the shorts-season cure for keratosis pilaris bumps, ingrown hairs and 'strawberry legs', with creators showing visible smoothing in 7-14 days. Creator angle: a '2-week strawberry legs diary' before/after, or a 'how to actually use a body acid stick (and why you NEED SPF after)' explainer.

trends.headline: 'Skin longevity' is BeautyTok's replacement for the word 'anti-aging'
trends.body: Creators are reframing routines around long-term skin function and barrier health ('skin longevity') instead of fighting wrinkles, a positioning shift driving demand for gentle daily actives over harsh anti-agers. Creator angle: a 'why I stopped saying anti-aging' explainer, or a 'skin longevity vs anti-aging - what actually changed in my routine' breakdown.

trends.headline: Wedge espadrilles are FashionTok's defining summer shoe of 2026
trends.body: The wedge espadrille is back as summer 2026's 'dress-and-sandal' shoe - creators are styling the rope-soled wedge with linen sets, denim and flowy dresses for an instant elevated-vacation look. Creator angle: a 'one espadrille, 5 outfits' styling reel, or a 'comfortable heel that actually survives cobblestones' travel-shoe review.

trends.headline: 'More-is-more' top layering is FashionTok's maximalist summer formula
trends.body: Maximalism is winning over minimalism: creators are stacking multiple tops and mixing textures (denim + sheer, embellishment + fringe) for a Rachel-Green-coded layered look that reads expensive on camera. Creator angle: a 'how many tops can I layer before it looks crazy' challenge, or a 'thrift-haul to maximalist outfit' transition reel.

trends.headline: 4-ingredient Strawberry Cheesecake Dip is FoodTok's 'unofficial dip of summer'
trends.body: A no-bake, 4-ingredient strawberry cheesecake dip (under 10 minutes) is the breakout poolside snack of summer 2026 - creamy, pink and made for fruit, graham crackers and cookies. Creator angle: a 10-second 'fold, dip, devour' ASMR reel, or a 'cookout dip everyone will ask about' recipe with a strawberry-season hook.

trends.headline: The Banana Bread Latte is DrinkTok's cozy-summer coffee pour
trends.body: Creators are caramelizing bananas with spices into a homemade syrup for a 'banana bread latte' - a warm-spiced iced coffee that turns overripe bananas into a viral cafe-at-home drink. Creator angle: a 'don't throw out brown bananas - make this' POV, or a 'banana bread latte vs the coffee-shop version' taste test.

trends.headline: 'Homifying' your workout is FitTok's answer to summer gym anxiety
trends.body: Rising 'gym anxiety' is pushing creators to rebuild full routines at home - weights, cardio and even sauna moments - under the 'homifying fitness' banner, no awkward gym crowd required. Creator angle: a 'my $200 at-home gym setup' tour, or a 'no-gym full-body summer routine you can do in a studio apartment' follow-along.

trends.headline: Mirror walls are HomeTok's space-doubling decor flex of 2026
trends.body: Creators are filling walls with one oversized mirror or a salon-style cluster of antique mirrors to instantly expand small rooms, bounce light and add 'collected' character. Creator angle: a 'renter-friendly mirror wall on a budget' DIY, or a thrift-flip 'I turned $40 of estate-sale mirrors into a gallery wall' reveal.

trends.headline: #DopamineDecor is HomeTok's mood-boosting color maximalism
trends.body: Dopamine decor - acid-yellow accents, bubblegum-pink seating and psychedelic prints - is trending as the antidote to beige minimalism, with creators framing bold color as a daily mood lift. Creator angle: a 'beige room to dopamine room' makeover transition, or a 'cheap ways to add color without painting (renter edition)' list reel.

trends.headline: Smart vanity mirrors with lighting + Bluetooth are TechTok's routine upgrade
trends.body: LED smart mirrors with built-in lighting and Bluetooth speakers are trending as the 'glow-up your morning' gadget - creators film get-ready-with-me routines lit by the mirror with music playing from it. Creator angle: a 'this mirror replaced my ring light AND my speaker' review, or a 'GRWM at my new vanity' setup reveal.

trends.headline: Elastic bubble fog wands are ParentTok's most satisfying summer toy
trends.body: The stretchy 'bubble fog' wand - which blows stacked, smoke-filled bubbles - is blowing up as the season's most satisfying, screen-free outdoor kid toy and ASMR-friendly content. Creator angle: a slow-mo 'most satisfying bubble toy ever' reel, or a 'cheap backyard boredom-buster that actually entertained my kids' honest review.

trends.headline: The 3-in-1 dog water bottle is PetTok's summer walk essential
trends.body: An all-in-one dog walking bottle - water dispenser + built-in treat compartment + poo scraper - is the season's viral 'why didn't this exist sooner' buy for hot-weather walks. Creator angle: a 'POV: the only thing I grab for summer walks now' demo, or a heat-safety 'how I keep my dog hydrated on walks' tips reel.

trends.headline: '$X a day in [A] vs [B]' comparison videos are TravelTok's debate-bait format
trends.body: Side-by-side budget comparisons ('$50 a day in Bali vs $50 a day in Albania') are outperforming pretty B-roll because the format sparks comment-section debate and friend-tagging that TikTok reads as engagement. Creator angle: pick two destinations and break down what the same daily budget buys in each, ending with a 'which would you pick?' CTA.

trends.headline: Permanent anklets are JewelryTok's must-have summer accessory
trends.body: The welded, clasp-free 'permanent anklet' is trending as summer 2026's commitment accessory - creators film the zap-weld moment and pair it with the coastal/mermaid-core aesthetic. Creator angle: a 'getting my first permanent anklet' POV with the welding ASMR, or a 'permanent jewelry - is it worth it?' honest review.
